$wpdb->prepare("
			SELECT DISTINCT YEAR( post_date ) AS year, MONTH( post_date ) AS month
			FROM $wpdb->posts
			WHERE post_type = %s
			ORDER BY post_date DESC
		", $post_type)
esc_html(ucfirst(_x('manual', 'update type - manual or automatic updates', 'stops-core-theme-and-plugin-updates')))
esc_html(ucfirst(_x('automatic', 'update type - manual or automatic updates', 'stops-core-theme-and-plugin-updates')))
wp_kses($icon, array('span' => array('class' => true), 'img' => array('src' => true, 'alt' => true)))
$wpdb->prepare("UPDATE {$wpdb->options} SET option_value = %s WHERE option_name = %s AND option_value < %d", $acquire_until, $this->option_name, $time_now)
$wpdb->prepare("UPDATE {$wpdb->options} SET option_value = %s WHERE option_name = %s AND option_value < %d", $acquire_until, $this->option_name, $time_now)

$wpdb->prepare(
			"SELECT complete_tasks, all_tasks FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS complete_tasks FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}tm_tasks WHERE `type` = %s AND `status` = %s) a, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS all_tasks FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}tm_tasks WHERE `type` = %s) b",
			array(
				$task_type,
				'complete',
				$task_type,
			)
		)
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT meta_value FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}tm_taskmeta WHERE task_id = %d AND meta_key = %s LIMIT 1", $id, $key)
$wpdb->prepare("UPDATE {$wpdb->base_prefix}tm_taskmeta SET meta_value = %s WHERE meta_key = %s AND task_id = %d", $value, $key, $id)
$wpdb->prepare("DELETE FROM {$wpdb->base_prefix}tm_taskmeta WHERE task_id = %d AND meta_key = %s LIMIT 1", $id, $key)

$wpdb->prepare("
			UPDATE {$wpdb->base_prefix}tm_tasks
			   SET last_locked_at = %d
			 WHERE id = %d
			   AND last_locked_at <= %s
		", time(), $task_id, $expires_at)

$wpdb->prepare("INSERT INTO {$wpdb->base_prefix}tm_tasks (type, user_id, description, class_identifier, status) VALUES (%s, %d, %s, %s, %s)", $type, $user_id, $description, $class_identifier, 'active')
